title: Define AttributeMeta record + Codec for attribute metadata table

reference_files.reason: System 1: Attribute system - attribute metadata structure, binds field, default_value semantics
Attribute metadata JSON format - field definitions for binds, default_value, description, color, priority, force_show

acceptance_criteria: AttributeMeta record defined with fields: binds (ResourceLocation), defaultValue (double), description (String, optional), color (String, optional), priority (int, default 0), forceShow (boolean, default false)
Codec<AttributeMeta> defined with correct serialization for all fields, using optional fields with defaults
Codec handles missing optional fields gracefully (description defaults to empty, color defaults to null/empty, priority defaults to 0, forceShow defaults to false)
binds field is required (not optional) in the Codec
Record is immutable (all fields final, no setters)
